steps.title: Identify the antecedent
steps.content: The particles belong to the Andromedid meteoroid stream, which is treated as a singular thing. The blank therefore needs a singular possessive determiner before particles.

steps.title: Reject pronoun errors
steps.content: A is plural and does not agree with the singular stream. B means they are, creating an ungrammatical phrase. C means it is, which also cannot fit before particles. The singular possessive form correctly shows the stream's particles. The answer is D.
